title: Complete onboarding successfully and land on Tasks
description: Verifies a logged-in user can complete the onboarding flow and is redirected to Tasks at the end.

steps.description: Fill a required field in Step 1 with "Test Value"

title: Finish remaining onboarding steps and verify completion confirmation
description: Verifies the user can proceed through subsequent onboarding steps and sees a completion confirmation.

title: Onboarding completion redirects user to Tasks
description: Verifies that after completing onboarding, the user is redirected to the Tasks page.

title: Validation blocks Next when a required field is blank
description: Verifies required-field validation appears and prevents moving to the next onboarding step.

title: Fix validation error and proceed to the next step
description: Verifies that after a validation error, entering a value allows the user to proceed.

steps.description: Fill the highlighted required field with "Fixed Value"

title: Resume onboarding by navigating directly to /onboarding while authenticated
description: Verifies an authenticated user can access the onboarding route and sees the first step content.

title: Onboarding step remains on current step after validation error
description: Verifies that a user cannot advance to the next step when validation fails and remains on the same step.

title: Update identity avatar and bio and see persisted changes
description: Verifies a user can update avatar and bio in Identity tab, save successfully, and see the updated information displayed.

steps.description: Update the avatar to a different available avatar option
Type "Updated bio for UI test" into the bio field

title: Save identity changes shows updated avatar and bio on the page
description: Verifies that after saving identity updates, the new avatar and bio are shown in the Identity tab UI.

steps.description: Type "Bio check: persisted" into the bio field
Verify text "Bio check: persisted" is visible

title: Navigate across settings tabs and return without losing unsaved state
description: Verifies tab navigation works between Identity, Security, and Preferences and the user can return to a tab and still interact with its fields.

title: Change password successfully from Security tab
description: Verifies the user can enter a valid new password and confirmation, save, and see a success toast.

steps.description: Type "NewPassword!234" into the New password field
Type "NewPassword!234" into the Confirm password field

title: Password confirmation mismatch shows inline error
description: Verifies that mismatched new password and confirmation prevents save and shows a visible mismatch error message.

steps.description: Type "NewPassword!234" into the New password field
Type "DifferentPassword!234" into the Confirm password field

title: View XP and level progress in User Hub
description: Verifies XP and level progress information is visible in the settings hub UI.

title: Create a task from List view and verify it appears in the Todo list
description: Verifies a user can toggle views, create a task with valid inputs, and see it appear in the Todo list.

steps.description: Click the toggle to switch to "List" view

title: Submit a new task with title and description and verify it shows in the Todo column (Kanban)
description: Verifies creating a task from the task creation form results in a visible new card in the Kanban Todo column.

steps.description: Click the toggle to switch to "Kanban" view
Type "E2E Task Title" into the Title field

title: Create task form RHF validation: blank title shows inline error and does not create task
description: Verifies the create task form prevents submission without a title and shows an inline validation message.

steps.description: Click the toggle to switch to "List" view

title: Switch between List and Kanban views without losing access to Create Task action
description: Verifies toggling views keeps core actions available and the page renders the expected view headers.

steps.description: Click the toggle to switch to "List" view
Verify element "Create Task" button is visible
Click the toggle to switch to "Kanban" view

title: Finances dashboard shows key charts and allows date filter update
description: Verifies the cash flow and category charts are visible and update after changing the date filter.

steps.description: Verify text "Spending by Category" is visible
Select "Last 30 days" from the date filter dropdown

title: Add transaction with AI category suggestion and verify it appears in table
description: Verifies adding a transaction with AI-suggested category results in a visible new row in the transactions table.

steps.description: Type "Coffee test" into the description field

title: AI category suggestion fails and user saves transaction with manual category
description: Verifies the UI shows an error toast on suggestion failure and allows manual category selection before saving.

steps.description: Type "AI fail path test" into the description field
Verify text "Category suggestion failed" is visible
Verify text "AI fail path test" is visible

title: Summary cards display balance and daily spend values
description: Verifies the finances summary cards show the balance and daily spend values on the dashboard.

steps.description: Scroll to the summary cards section

title: Date filter change preserves chart visibility and does not break dashboard rendering
description: Verifies charts remain visible and the dashboard continues to render after changing the date filter multiple times.

steps.description: Select "This month" from the date filter dropdown
Select "This year" from the date filter dropdown
Verify text "Spending by Category" is visible

title: Add transaction validation prevents saving with missing required fields
description: Verifies the transaction form shows a visible validation message when trying to save without required inputs.

steps.description: Verify text "Amount is required" is visible

title: Create a new habit and confirm it appears in the list
description: Verifies that a user can create a habit with required fields and the new habit is shown in the habit list.

steps.description: Click on "Habits" in the main navigation
Select "Morning" from the "Time of day" dropdown

title: Create habit validation: blank title shows inline error and does not create habit
description: Verifies inline validation prevents creating a habit when the title is missing.

steps.description: Click on "Habits" in the main navigation
Verify text "Title is required" is visible

title: Edit an existing habit target value and verify habit card reflects changes
description: Verifies editing a habit updates the visible target value on the habit card after saving.

steps.description: Click on "Habits" in the main navigation
Click the first habit in the habit list

title: Edit habit updates visible analytics section for the selected habit
description: Verifies that after editing and saving a habit, the analytics area remains visible and reflects the updated habit context.

steps.description: Click on "Habits" in the main navigation
Click the first habit in the habit list

title: Habit list and analytics sections load on Habits page
description: Verifies the Habits page shows the habit list and the analytics widgets expected for tracking.

steps.description: Click on "Habits" in the main navigation

title: Quick Capture creates a task from AI-parsed preview and shows it in Tasks
description: Verifies that a user can open the AI Assistant, send a structured quick-capture message, confirm the parsed preview, and see the new task in the task list.

steps.description: Click the floating action button (FAB) for the AI Assistant
Type "Create task: Buy milk tomorrow" into the chat message input

title: AI chat freeform query returns suggested actions and user executes 'create task' action
description: Verifies that an AI response can suggest actions and the user can execute one action to create a task successfully.

steps.description: Click the floating action button (FAB) for the AI Assistant
Verify element "chat message input" is visible
Type "I need to plan groceries for tomorrow. What should I do?" into the chat message input
Click the suggested action that creates a task

title: AI Assistant can be opened from a different page and remains usable
description: Verifies the AI Assistant FAB is accessible from another feature page and the chat modal opens correctly.

steps.description: Click on "Habits" in the main navigation
Click the floating action button (FAB) for the AI Assistant
Click the "Close" button on the chat modal
Verify element "chat modal" is not visible

title: Sending an empty chat message is blocked
description: Verifies the chat does not send when the message input is empty and provides visible feedback.

steps.description: Click the floating action button (FAB) for the AI Assistant
Verify element "chat message input" is visible
Verify text "Type a message" is visible

title: Canceling the AI parsed preview does not create a task
description: Verifies that dismissing/canceling the confirmation step prevents task creation.

steps.description: Click the floating action button (FAB) for the AI Assistant
Type "Create task: Do not create me" into the chat message input
Verify text "Do not create me" is not visible

title: Chat modal can be closed with Escape without losing page context
description: Verifies that the chat modal closes via keyboard and the user remains on the same page.

steps.description: Click the floating action button (FAB) for the AI Assistant
Verify element "chat modal" is not visible

title: Open University module and view course cards with current averages
description: Verifies the University module can be opened from the main navigation and displays course cards with visible average grades.

steps.description: Click on "University" in the sidebar navigation

title: Open a course card to view assignments and grade totals
description: Verifies a user can open a course from the University module and see an assignment list plus visible grade totals.

steps.description: Click on "University" in the sidebar navigation
Click on the first visible course card

title: Add an assignment with grade and weight and see course average update
description: Verifies adding a valid assignment recalculates the course average displayed on the course page.

steps.description: Click on "University" in the sidebar navigation
Click on the first visible course card
Type "Midterm" into the assignment name/title field

title: Use What-If simulator to calculate projected final grade
description: Verifies the What-If simulator accepts a hypothetical grade and shows a projected final grade after calculation.

steps.description: Click on "University" in the sidebar navigation
Type "92" into the hypothetical grade field

title: What-If simulator: calculate with blank input shows validation error
description: Verifies the What-If simulator prevents calculation when required hypothetical grade input is blank and displays an error.

steps.description: Click on "University" in the sidebar navigation

title: Add assignment with missing required fields shows validation and does not create assignment
description: Verifies validation errors appear when saving an assignment with missing required fields and that no new assignment is added to the list.

steps.description: Click on "University" in the sidebar navigation
Click on the first visible course card

title: Assignment grade field rejects non-numeric input (validation)
description: Verifies the grade input enforces numeric validation and shows a visible error for invalid characters.

steps.description: Click on "University" in the sidebar navigation
Click on the first visible course card
Type "Quiz 1" into the assignment name/title field

title: Assignment weight field rejects out-of-range values (validation)
description: Verifies the weight input prevents invalid ranges (e.g., > 100) and displays a visible validation error.

steps.description: Click on "University" in the sidebar navigation
Click on the first visible course card
Type "Final Exam" into the assignment name/title field

title: Create a new journal entry and see it in the list with timestamp
description: Verifies a user can create and save a journal entry and then sees it appear in the entries list with a timestamp.

title: Save a journal entry after writing content
description: Verifies the New Entry flow allows writing content and saving successfully.

title: Write content and save; verify entry appears with timestamp
description: Verifies that saving a journal entry persists it and shows it in the list along with a visible timestamp.

steps.description: Type "Today I feel focused and made progress on my priorities." into the journal content field

title: Complete end-to-end happy path save and confirm the new entry is visible
description: Verifies the full happy path: create entry, save, and confirm the new entry is visible in the journal list.

title: Attempt to save an empty journal entry shows validation error
description: Verifies saving with empty content shows the validation error "Content required".

title: Empty entry is not saved after validation error
description: Verifies that after attempting to save empty content and seeing the error, no new entry is added to the journal list.

title: Fix validation by adding content after error, then save successfully
description: Verifies a user can recover from the "Content required" error by typing content and saving, resulting in a visible entry.

steps.description: Type "Added content after validation error." into the journal content field

title: Habit completion awards points and updates streak, reflected in Settings XP/Level
description: Verifies completing a habit increases points and streak immediately and the updated XP/level is visible in Settings.

steps.description: Click the "Sign in" or "Log in" button
Click on "Habits" in the main navigation
Click the first visible habit action that marks it as completed for today (for example, "Complete" or a checkmark button)

title: After habit completion, Settings shows updated XP and level progress
description: Verifies the XP/level progress shown in Settings reflects a recently completed habit.

steps.description: Click the "Sign in" or "Log in" button
Click on "Habits" in the main navigation
Click the first visible habit action that marks it as completed for today (for example, "Complete" or a checkmark button)
Click on "Settings" in the main navigation

title: Task completion triggers celebration feedback and awards points
description: Verifies completing a task results in visible celebration feedback (e.g., confetti message) and a visible points/XP update indicator.

steps.description: Click the "Sign in" or "Log in" button
Click on "Tasks" in the main navigation
Click the first visible task completion control (for example, a checkbox or "Mark complete" button)
Verify text "XP" is visible or Verify text "Points" is visible

title: Task completion increases visible level progress indicator
description: Verifies level progress bar or level indicator changes after completing a task.

steps.description: Click the "Sign in" or "Log in" button
Click on "Tasks" in the main navigation
Verify text "Level" is visible or Verify text "XP" is visible
Click the first visible task completion control (for example, a checkbox or "Mark complete" button)

title: Habit completion does not double-award points when clicking complete twice
description: Verifies attempting to complete the same habit twice does not show a second award indicator or duplicate completion state.

steps.description: Click the "Sign in" or "Log in" button
Click on "Habits" in the main navigation
Click the first visible habit action that marks it as completed for today (for example, "Complete" or a checkmark button)
Click the same habit completion control again
Verify text "Completed" is visible or Verify element "Completed" is visible

title: Gamification indicators are visible in Settings (XP/Level section present)
description: Verifies Settings consistently surfaces XP and level progress UI elements for the logged-in user.

steps.description: Click the "Sign in" or "Log in" button
Click on "Settings" in the main navigation
